headline: Should Value Investors Buy Dollar General (DG) Stock?
summary: Here at Zacks, our focus is on the proven Zacks Rank system, which emphasizes earnings estimates and estimate revisions to find great stocks. Nevertheless, we are always paying attention to the latest value, growth, and momentum trends to underscore strong picks.

headline: Dollar General Awards Spotlight Digital Push As Shares Trade Below Targets
summary: Dollar General, NYSE:DG, has received multiple national industry awards for customer experience and digital initiatives. The company was recognised for its digital commerce capabilities, including the myDG loyalty program and same day myDG Delivery service. These awards highlight a shift in focus toward digital engagement alongside Dollar General's traditional discount retail footprint. Dollar General's push into digital services arrives at a time when the stock trades around $106.23, with...
